flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Eastern Wyoming College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Eastern Wyoming College rose 18% between 2006 and 2009 (28.4% → 33.6%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Eastern Wyoming College fell 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($8.0k → $7.0k).
